purpose: Persistent registry of tool cards that already received editorial mid-article illustrations. Check this file before adding future tool-card artwork so the same page is not illustrated twice.
selection_rule: Exclude every slug listed in batches[].slugs unless the user explicitly asks to replace or revise an existing illustration.

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure after the opening editorial paragraph
batches.visual_direction: story-forward ChatGPT/imagegen artwork; mixed-media paper diorama scenes; no logos, readable text, dashboards, faces, or SVG placeholders
batches.note: Added after Sheet seed of 20 rising AI tools; replaces rejected SVG-like placeholder images with narrative artistic WebP illustrations.

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure before the main functions/features section
batches.note: Second generation run only. The first stopped run was discarded because it looked too uniform; this batch uses one distinct tool-specific visual metaphor per tool.

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure after the first substantive section

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure before the main functions/features or practical-use section
batches.note: Seventeenth production batch: next 30 remaining manually edited cards after Quark, selected alphabetically from non-illustrated registry-backed tool cards. The set was regenerated after uniformity feedback with deliberately varied visual styles: paper collage, parchment map, blueprint, light isometric, studio still life, darkroom, acoustic sculpture, and pastel logistics diagrams. Selected PNG outputs were converted to 1260px WebP; variants with logo, profile/head, text, or repeated-dashboard artifacts were rejected.

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure before the main functions/features or practical-use section
batches.note: Eighteenth production-style batch: next 30 remaining manually edited cards after Rev.com, selected alphabetically from non-illustrated registry-backed tool cards, from Reverso through Scrivener. The set was regenerated after user feedback to reduce dashboard-like repetition and add story-forward scenes, including photo still lifes, paper dioramas, mixed-media collage, miniature laboratories, film sets, and physical workflow objects. Normal props such as phones, keypads, envelopes, calendars, stamps, and office pictograms were accepted when they supported the scene; selected variants still avoided readable text, logos, dominant faces/avatars, and screenshot-like dashboard compositions. Selected PNG outputs were converted to 1260px WebP, and the PNG generation cache is intended to be cleaned after conversion.

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure before the main functions/features or practical-use section
batches.note: Nineteenth production-style batch: 50 currently remaining registry-backed, non-illustrated manually edited cards, selected alphabetically from Acapela Group through Audiotool. User requested more varied illustration styles, so the set deliberately avoids dashboard-like repetition and mixes photo still lifes, paper dioramas, mixed-media collage, physical data metaphors, hardware macro scenes, audio workbenches, learning stages, and workflow objects. Generated as raster PNG through the Codex image generation flow and converted directly to 1260px WebP; no project PNG cache is kept after conversion.

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure before the main functions/features section

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure before the main functions/features section

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure before the main functions/features section, or the next available editorial workflow section when no feature heading exists
batches.note: Twenty-third production-style batch: 50 active, registry-backed, non-illustrated manually edited cards, selected from newly edited earlier alphabetical gaps and the next active sequence, from 8x8 through Meta AI. User corrected the required final asset size to 1260x800, so only landscape generations were published; square draft variants were not inserted. The set mixes tactile communication dioramas, creative worktables, privacy mazes, security still lifes, learning workshops, music and video production scenes, localization and marketing collages, mobile security scenes, and assistant workspaces.

batches.placement: mid-article image-only figure before the main functions/features section

The run was resumed after 43 generated images; the final seven were generated in the follow-up session. The set keeps the wide 1260x800 asset contract and mixes BI workrooms, chatbot workshops, Azure pipeline and security dioramas, Microsoft productivity still lifes, SEO and observability scenes, voice/dictation workspaces, creative writing/art studios, and AI hardware/data-center macro scenes. Selected PNG outputs were copied into the workspace only as converted WebP assets; generated PNG originals remain in the Codex image cache.
